shopping_213.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The primary reason for failure was incorrectly identifying the patio set with "the most stars". While two patio sets had a 5-star rating, I failed to use the number of reviews as a tie-breaker. The objective implies finding the *best* rated product, and when star ratings are equal, a higher number of reviews indicates a more robust and preferred rating. I selected a 5-star product with 5 reviews, instead of another 5-star product with 12 reviews.
shopping_213.REFLECTION: When the objective specifies "most stars" and multiple products share the highest star rating, use the number of reviews as a secondary criterion. The product with the highest star rating *and* the most reviews should be considered the one with "the most stars". Always scan all visible products on the page to ensure the absolute best match is selected according to all criteria.

REFLECTION:
